016package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao;
017
018import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
019import androidx.room.Dao;
020import androidx.room.Insert;
021import androidx.room.Query;
022import androidx.room.Update;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare;
024import java.time.Instant;
025import java.util.Collection;
026import java.util.List;
027
028/**
029 * Data Access Object interface for {@link DigSiteSquare} entity. Provides methods for managing
030 * individual squares on the game board, including batch operations for game initialization and
031 * state updates.
032 */
033@Dao
034public interface DigSiteSquareDao {
035
036  /**
037   * Inserts a batch of dig site squares into the database, typically when populating a new game
038   * board.
039   *
040   * @param digSiteSquares Collection of squares to insert.
041   * @return List of generated primary key IDs.
042   */
043  @Insert
044  List<Long> insertRaw(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares);
045
046  default List<Long> insert(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares) {
047    Instant now = Instant.now();
048    digSiteSquares.forEach((square) -> square.setLastModified(now));
049    return insertRaw(digSiteSquares);
050  }
051
052
053
054  /**
055   * Retrieves all dig site squares for a specific grid as observable live data.
056   *
057   * @param gridId Grid ID.
058   * @return LiveData containing list of all squares in the specified grid.
059   */
060  @Query("SELECT * FROM dig_site_square WHERE belonging_grid_id = :gridId ORDER BY y_coordinate, x_coordinate")
061  LiveData<List<DigSiteSquare>> selectByGridId(long gridId);
062
063  /**
064   * Retrieves a single dig site square by its primary key.
065   *
066   * @param id Square ID.
067   * @return Dig site square with the specified ID, or {@code null} if not found.
068   */
069  @Query("SELECT * FROM dig_site_square WHERE dig_site_square_id = :id")
070  DigSiteSquare selectById(long id);
071
072  /**
073   * Retrieves a single dig site square by its coordinates within a specific grid.
074   *
075   * @param gridId Grid ID.
076   * @param x X coordinate.
077   * @param y Y coordinate.
078   * @return Dig site square at the specified coordinates, or {@code null} if not found.
079   */
080  @Query("SELECT * FROM dig_site_square WHERE belonging_grid_id = :gridId AND x_coordinate = :x AND y_coordinate = :y")
081  DigSiteSquare selectByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y);
082
083  // TODO: 3/16/2026 query moore neighborhood...? or is that a service ting?
084  //  or just a query by x range, y range, and digsite? and zero neighbors field?
085
086  /**
087   * Updates a single dig site square, typically used when a player interacts with a square on the
088   * board.
089   *
090   * @param digSiteSquare Dig site square to update.
091   * @return Number of rows updated (should be 1).
092   */
093  @Update
094  int updateRaw(DigSiteSquare digSiteSquare);
095
096  default int update(DigSiteSquare digSiteSquare) {
097    digSiteSquare.setLastModified(Instant.now());
098    return updateRaw(digSiteSquare);
099  }
100
101  /**
102   * Updates multiple dig site squares in a batch operation.
103   * Useful for cascading reveals.
104   * @param digSiteSquares Collection of squares to update.
105   * @return Number of rows updated.
106   */
107  @Update
108  int updateRaw(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares);
109
110  default int update(Collection<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares) {
111    Instant now = Instant.now();
112    digSiteSquares.forEach((square) -> square.setLastModified(now));
113    return updateRaw(digSiteSquares);
114  }
115}
